nasb.text: And if this should come to the governor’s ears, we will win him over and keep you out of trouble.”

esv.text: And if this comes to the governor’s ears, we will satisfy him and keep you out of trouble.”

cnv.text: 如果總督知道了這件事，我們會說服他，不會牽連你們。”

ccb.text: 如果这件事传到总督那里，我们一定会替你们出面，保你们无事。”

csbs.text: 如果这事被总督听见了，我们会说服他，保证你们无事。”
